info.title: TodoList API
info.description:
Personal todo management application API. Allows authenticated users to manage todos organized by category with due-date based status tracking.

## Authentication
All endpoints (except `/auth/sign-up` and `/auth/sign-in`) require a Bearer JWT token in the `Authorization` header.

## Todo Status Logic
Todo status is derived from `is_completed` and `due_date` fields — it is never stored directly:
- **completed**: `is_completed = true`
- **overdue**: `is_completed = false` AND `due_date < today`
- **active**: `is_completed = false` AND (`due_date >= today` OR `due_date IS NULL`)

## Business Rules
- `BR-01`: All app features require an authenticated user.
- `BR-02`: Categories are user-scoped and are never shared between users.
- `BR-03`: Todo status is one of `active`, `overdue`, or `completed`.
- `BR-04`: Overdue condition: `due_date < today AND is_completed = false`.
- `BR-05`: A todo may be created without a category.
- `BR-06`: Users can only read, modify, or delete their own resources.
- `BR-07`: Deleting a category does NOT delete its todos; their `category_id` becomes `null`.

## Error Response Format
All errors follow the shape:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "message": "Human-readable message",
    "type": "ERROR_TYPE_CONSTANT"
  }
}
```

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: User registration, login, logout, and account deletion

tags.name: Todos
tags.description: CRUD operations for todos, plus completion toggling

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: CRUD operations for user-defined todo categories

post.description:
Creates a new user account with email and password. On success, returns a JWT token and the created user object so the client can automatically log in.

**Validation rules:**
- `email` must be a valid RFC 5322 email address and must be unique.
- `password` must be at least 8 characters long.
- `passwordConfirm` must match `password` (client-side guard; server validates password length only).

400.description: Validation error — missing field, invalid email format, or password shorter than 8 characters.

post.summary: Authenticate and receive a JWT token
post.description:
Validates email and password against the database (bcrypt comparison). On success, returns a signed HS-512 JWT token valid for 7 days.

For security reasons the error message does NOT distinguish between an unknown email and a wrong password.

401.description: Invalid credentials (wrong password or unknown email). The message is intentionally generic.

post.description: Server-side logout endpoint. The server acknowledges the logout; the client is responsible for deleting the JWT token from its storage. No blacklist is maintained server-side.

delete.summary: Permanently delete the authenticated user's account
delete.description:
Deletes the currently authenticated user's account and **all associated data** (todos and categories) via database CASCADE.

This operation is irreversible.

200.description: Account and all associated data permanently deleted.

get.summary: Retrieve all todos for the authenticated user
get.description:
Returns todos owned by the authenticated user. Supports optional filtering by computed status and/or category.

The `status` field on each returned todo object is computed server-side:
- `active`: not completed AND (no due_date OR due_date >= today)
- `overdue`: not completed AND due_date < today
- `completed`: is_completed = true

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Filter by category ID. Pass `null` (or omit) to return all categories. To get uncategorized todos, this filter cannot be used directly — retrieve all and filter client-side.

data.title: 회의 자료 준비
data.description: 상세 마케팅 자료 및 PPT 포함

post.description:
Creates a new todo for the authenticated user.

**Field constraints:**
- `title` is required; maximum 50 characters.
- `description` is optional; maximum 200 characters.
- `due_date` is optional; format `YYYY-MM-DD`.
- `category_id` is optional. When provided, the category must belong to the authenticated user.

400.description: Validation error — title missing, title exceeds 50 chars, or description exceeds 200 chars.

403.description: The supplied `category_id` belongs to another user.

error.message: 해당 카테고리에 대한 접근 권한이 없습니다.

patch.description:
Partially updates the todo identified by `id`. All body fields are optional — only the provided fields are updated.

The authenticated user must own the todo.

400.description: Validation error on the provided fields.

delete.description:
Removes the todo identified by `id` from the database. This action is irreversible.

The authenticated user must own the todo.

patch.description:
Sets `is_completed = true` for the todo. The returned object will have `status: "completed"`.

If the todo is already completed, the call is idempotent and returns the unchanged resource.

The authenticated user must own the todo.

patch.summary: Revert a completed todo back to active or overdue
patch.description:
Sets `is_completed = false` for the todo. The returned `status` is then recomputed:
- If `due_date` is in the past: `overdue`
- Otherwise (or no `due_date`): `active`

The authenticated user must own the todo.

200.description: Todo reverted to incomplete. Status is `active` or `overdue` depending on `due_date`.

revertedToOverdue.summary: Due date in the past — becomes overdue

revertedToActive.summary: Due date in the future — becomes active

get.summary: List all categories for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns every category owned by the authenticated user, ordered by creation date ascending.

post.description:
Creates a category scoped to the authenticated user.

**Validation rules:**
- `name` is required and must not be blank.
- `name` must be at most 20 characters long.
- `name` must be unique within the authenticated user's categories (case-sensitive).

400.description: Validation error — name is empty or exceeds 20 characters.

error.message: 카테고리 이름은 최대 20자까지 입력할 수 있습니다.

409.description: A category with the same name already exists for this user.

patch.description:
Updates the `name` of the category identified by `id`.

The authenticated user must own the category. The new name must be unique within the user's categories.

**Validation rules:** same as `POST /categories`.

400.description: Validation error on the new name.

409.description: Another category with the same new name already exists for this user.

delete.description:
Deletes the category identified by `id`.

All todos that belonged to this category are **NOT deleted** — their `category_id` is set to `null` (database `ON DELETE SET NULL` constraint).

The authenticated user must own the category.

200.description: Category deleted. Affected todos now have `category_id: null`.

data.message: 카테고리가 삭제되었습니다. 소속 할일은 카테고리 미지정 상태가 되었습니다.

bearerAuth.description: HS-512 signed JWT token. Obtain from `POST /auth/sign-in` or `POST /auth/sign-up`. Include in every protected request as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

ResourceId.name: id
ResourceId.description: The numeric ID of the resource.

password.description: Plain-text password (minimum 8 characters). The server stores only the bcrypt hash.

User.description: Public representation of a user (password is never returned).

AuthResponse.description: Wrapper returned by sign-up and sign-in.

token.description: HS-512 signed JWT token. Store in memory or HttpOnly cookie.

Category.description: A user-defined label for grouping todos.

name.description: Category name — unique per user, max 20 characters.
Desired category name. Must be unique for the authenticated user.
New category name. Must be unique for the authenticated user.

TodoStatus.description:
Computed status of a todo:
- `active`: not completed AND (no due_date OR due_date >= today)
- `overdue`: not completed AND due_date < today
- `completed`: is_completed = true

Todo.description: A task item owned by a user. The `status` field is computed server-side and never stored in the database.

category_id.description: ID of the assigned category. `null` means uncategorized.

description.example: PRD와 도메인 정의서 기반으로 요구사항 분석 작성

due_date.description: Target completion date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. Optional.

is_completed.description: Whether the todo has been manually marked as completed.

TodoWithStatus.description: Todo object enriched with the computed `status` field returned by the API.

category_id.description: Optional category ID. Must belong to the authenticated user.

UpdateTodoRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only the provided fields are updated.

description.example: PR #42 코드 리뷰, 승인, 머지 포함

due_date.description: New due date. Pass `null` to remove.

category_id.description: New category ID. Pass `null` to unassign.

SuccessMessageResponse.description: Generic success response with a human-readable message.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response envelope returned for all 4xx and 5xx status codes.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but the resource belongs to another user.

error.message: 해당 리소스에 대한 접근 권한이 없습니다.

NotFound.description: The requested resource does not exist.

InternalServerError.description: An unexpected server-side error occurred. Stack trace is only included when `NODE_ENV=development`.
